creator: freebsd@beardz.net
text:
On 02/12/2011 14:52, DULMANDAKH Sukhbaatar wrote:
> Hello,
>
>> -fPIC is passed as an addition to CFLAGS for amd64 and powerpc in the port
>> Makefile.
>
> I saw that, but seems not working.
>
>> Are you by any chance clobbering CFLAGS (using CFLAGS= instead of CFLAGS+=)
>> in your /etc/make.conf ?
>
> my make.conf looks like below, tried both = and += for CFLAGS, but no luck.
>
> CPUTYPE=opteron
> CFLAGS= -O2 -fno-strict-aliasing -pipe
>
> Also I don't see -fPIC during build process.
>

This follow-up was sent to me privately - sending as follow-up to PR.
